headline: Align Technology (ALGN) Stock Looks Undervalued With Earnings Priced About Right
summary: Align Technology stock is caught between a weak long term share price record and valuation indicators that suggest the current market price may still sit below its intrinsic value. Despite the share price being down sharply over five years, the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate currently points to meaningful upside relative to where the stock trades. Align Technology shares have declined 72.5% over the past five years, which means long term holders have taken substantial...
